title: India Vehicle Registration of a Motor Vehicle (Form 20)
description: Apply to the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways (MoRTH), through the Regional Transport Office (RTO)/registering authority in whose jurisdiction the vehicle is kept, for the permanent registration of a motor vehicle under section 39 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 and Rule 47 of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989, in Form 20. This is India's first-time, one-time vehicle-registration event — the 'Registration/Tag' counterpart, at the opposite end of a vehicle's life, to the already-published in/morth/vehicle-registration-renewal (Form 25, periodic renewal of an existing registration) and in/morth/vehicle-ownership-transfer (Forms 29/30, a change of registered owner on an already-registered vehicle). An application must ordinarily be made within seven days of taking delivery of the vehicle (excluding the period of any journey to bring it to the place of registration), or before a temporary registration expires if one was issued. Models the standard registration of a new, ex-army, imported, or in-use e-rickshaw/e-cart, non-transport (private) motor vehicle by an individual, firm, or other listed ownership type. It does not model: registration of a transport (commercial) vehicle, which requires additional particulars (Form 20 items 29-39, e.g. gross vehicle weight, axle weights, permit particulars) not modelled here; the Dealer Point Registration workflow, by which most new vehicles are in practice pre-registered electronically by an authorized dealer using the manufacturer's Homologation-portal data before the buyer ever sees a paper Form 20; issuance or renewal of a temporary registration; reassignment of a registration mark; or a locally-manufactured trailer/semi-trailer's separate State Transport Authority design-approval process. It does not submit the application; the live Parivahan/VAHAN portal and the applicant's RTO are always authoritative — see VERIFICATION.md.

authority.name: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways, Government of India, through the state Regional Transport Offices (RTOs), under the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989

source.documentRef: Form 20 [Refer Rule 47 and Rule 53A], Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored directly from the current Form 20 PDF, downloadable without a bot-block from parivahan.gov.in (Parivahan Sewa, the Ministry's own e-governance portal), text-extracted in full (all 4 pages) with pdfjs-dist getTextContent. Cross-checked against the Ministry's own 'Permanent Registration' guidance page (parivahan.gov.in/en/content/permanent-registration, a server-rendered Drupal page fetched directly with curl, HTTP 200, not a JS SPA shell), whose 'Guidelines' and 'Documents required' sections corroborate the seven-day filing window, the Rule 81 fee reference, and the documents[] checklist (including which items the guidance page itself marks with an asterisk as state-variable). The live parivahan.gov.in/VAHAN transactional e-service is state-instanced, and new-vehicle registration is in practice almost always initiated by an authorized dealer through the separate, credentialed Dealer Point Registration module (not a public applicant-facing wizard), so the full field-by-field comparison manual-source-review-v1 (Procedure step 2) requires against a live portal has not been completed. Status remains draft, not verified.

fields.name: registeredOwnerFullName
fields.label: Full Name of person to be registered as Registered owner
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '1. Full Name of person to be registered as Registered owner'

fields.name: relationToRegisteredOwner
fields.label: Relation of the named related person to the registered owner
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — 'Son/Wife/Daughter of'

fields.name: relatedPersonName
fields.label: Name of father/husband (per the selected relation)
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — 'Son/Wife/Daughter of'

fields.name: registeredOwnerAge
fields.label: Age of person to be registered as Registered owner
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '2. Age of person to be registered as Registered owner'

fields.name: permanentAddress
fields.label: Permanent address
fields.description: See the proofOfAddress document for the list of documents the form itself accepts as evidence of this address.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '3. Permanent address'

fields.name: temporaryOrOfficialAddress
fields.label: Temporary address/Official address, if any
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '4. Temporary address/Official address, if any'

fields.name: ownershipType
fields.label: Ownership type
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '4A Ownership type' (listed options 1-15)

fields.name: durationOfStayAtPresentAddress
fields.label: Duration of stay at the present address
fields.description: As printed on a free-form ruled line on the source form (e.g. '5 years'), not a structured numeric field there.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '5. Duration of stay at the present address'

fields.name: ownerMobileNumber
fields.label: Mobile number of the owner of the vehicle
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '5(A) Mobile number of the owner of the vehicle'

fields.name: panNumber
fields.label: PAN number (optional)
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '6. PAN number (optional)'

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '7. Place of birth'

fields.name: dateMigratedToIndia
fields.label: If place of birth is outside India, when migrated to India
fields.description: Applicable only when placeOfBirth is outside India. Not encoded as a requiredWhen condition on placeOfBirth: the source form's own gate ('if place of birth is outside India') is a free-text country judgment, not a fixed enum value this schema's condition grammar can compare against.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '8. If place of birth is outside India, when migrated to India'

fields.name: nomineeName
fields.label: Name of the nominee
fields.description: The source form prints this item without an explicit '(optional)' marker, unlike item 6; modelled as optional here since nomination under the CMVR is a discretionary facility, not a universal requirement for registration — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '9A. Name of the nominee'

fields.name: nomineeRelationship
fields.label: Relationship with the nominee
fields.description: Applicable only when nomineeName is supplied. Not encoded as a requiredWhen condition on nomineeName: GSP-0013's condition grammar has no field-absence operator, and gating on notEquals '' against an optional string field misfires (an absent value is not the same as an empty string).
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '9B. Relationship with the nominee'

fields.name: dealerOrManufacturerNameAddress
fields.label: Name and address of the Dealer or Manufacturer from whom the vehicle was purchased
fields.description: See the saleCertificateForm21 and roadWorthinessCertificate documents, which the form requires to be enclosed alongside this item.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '10. Name and address of the Dealer or Manufacturer from whom the vehicle was purchased (sale certificate and certificate of road worthiness issued by the manufacturer to be enclosed)'

fields.name: vehicleRegisteredAs
fields.label: The motor vehicle is
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '13. The motor vehicle is (a) a new vehicle, (b) ex-army vehicle, (c) imported vehicle (d) in use E-rickshaw or E-cart'

fields.name: classOfVehicle
fields.label: Class of vehicle (if motor cycle, whether with or without gear)
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '12. Class of vehicle (if motor cycle, whether with or without gear)'

fields.name: bodyType
fields.label: Type of body
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '14. Type of body'

fields.name: vehicleType
fields.label: Type of vehicle
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '15. Type of vehicle'

fields.name: makersName
fields.label: Maker's name
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '16. Maker's name'

fields.name: monthYearOfManufacture
fields.label: Month and year of manufacture
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '17. Month and year of manufacture'

fields.name: numberOfCylinders
fields.label: Number of cylinders
fields.description: 0 for a Battery Operated Vehicle with no cylinders.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '18. Number of cylinders'

fields.name: horsePower
fields.label: Horse power
fields.description: Printed as its own numbered item on Form 20 (unlike Form 25, which combines cubic capacity/horse power into a single blank). Modelled as optional since many vehicle classes' registration paperwork in practice completes only cubic capacity; left blank for Battery Operated Vehicles.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '19. Horse power'

fields.name: cubicCapacity
fields.label: Cubic capacity
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '20. Cubic capacity'

fields.name: makersClassificationOrWheelBase
fields.label: Maker's classification or if not known, wheel base
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '21. Maker's classification or if not known, wheel base'

fields.name: chassisNumber
fields.label: Chassis No.
fields.description: The source form additionally instructs '(Affix Pencil print)' — see the pencilPrintOfChassisAndEngineNumber document.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '22. Chassis No. (Affix Pencil print)'

fields.name: engineOrMotorNumber
fields.label: Engine Number or Motor Number in case of Battery Operated Vehicles
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '23. Engine Number or Motor Number in case of Battery Operated Vehicles'

fields.name: seatingCapacityIncludingDriver
fields.label: Seating capacity (including driver)
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '24. Seating capacity (including driver)'

fields.name: standingCapacity
fields.label: Standing capacity
fields.description: Applicable to buses and other vehicles permitted to carry standing passengers; left blank on the source form otherwise.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '24A Standing capacity'

fields.name: sleeperCapacity
fields.label: Sleeper capacity
fields.description: Applicable to sleeper coaches; left blank on the source form otherwise.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '24B. Sleeper capacity'

fields.name: fuelUsed
fields.label: Fuel used in the engine
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '25. Fuel used in the engine'

fields.name: unladenWeight
fields.label: Unladen weight
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '26. Unladen weight'

fields.name: previousRegistrationParticulars
fields.label: Particulars of previous registration and registered number (if any)
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '27. Particulars of previous registration and registered number (if any)'

fields.name: bodyColour
fields.label: Colour or colours of body, wings and front end
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '28. Colour or colours of body wings and front end'

fields.name: notPreviouslyRegisteredInIndiaDeclaration
fields.label: Declaration: the motor vehicle has not been registered in any State in India
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — 'I hereby declare that the motor vehicle has not been registered in any State in India.'

fields.name: vehicleUnderEncumbrance
fields.label: Is the vehicle subject to a hire-purchase agreement, lease agreement, or hypothecation?
fields.description: Where true, encumbranceType and encumbranceHolderName apply.
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — 'The motor vehicle above described is— (i) Subject to Hire-Purchase agreement/Lease agreement with... (ii) Subject to hypothecation in favour of... (iii) Not held under Hire-Purchase agreement, or lease agreement or subject to Hypothecation. Strike out whatever is inapplicable.'

fields.name: encumbranceType
fields.label: Type of encumbrance
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '(i) Subject to Hire-Purchase agreement/Lease agreement with...' vs. '(ii) Subject to hypothecation in favour of...'

fields.name: encumbranceHolderName
fields.label: Name of the hire-purchase/lease party, or the party in whose favour the vehicle is hypothecated
fields.sourceRef: Form 20 — '(i) Subject to Hire-Purchase agreement/Lease agreement with...' / '(ii) Subject to hypothecation in favour of...'

documents.label: Sale certificate (Form 21)
documents.sourceRef: Form 20 — '10. ... (sale certificate ... issued by the manufacturer to be enclosed)'; parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Sales certificate in Form 21'

documents.label: Road worthiness certificate (Form 22 from the manufacturer, or Form 22A from the body builder)
documents.sourceRef: Form 20 — '10. ... certificate of road worthiness issued by the manufacturer to be enclosed'; parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Road worthiness certificate in Form 22 from the manufacturers (Form 22A from the Body builder)'

documents.label: Pollution Under Control (PUC) certificate
documents.sourceRef: parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Pollution under control certificate' (listed without the guidance page's asterisk that marks state-variable items)

documents.label: Valid insurance certificate
documents.sourceRef: parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Valid insurance certificate' (listed without an asterisk)

documents.label: Proof of address
documents.sourceRef: Form 20 — '3. Permanent address (Electoral Roll/Life Insurance Policy/Passport/Pay slip issued by any office of the Central Government/State Government or a local body/Any other document or documents as may be prescribed by the State Government/Affidavit sworn before an Executive Magistrate or a First Class Judicial Magistrate or a Notary Public to be enclosed)'; parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Proof of address' (listed without an asterisk)

documents.label: Pencil print of the chassis and engine number
documents.sourceRef: Form 20 — '22. Chassis No. (Affix Pencil print)'; parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Chassis & Engine Pencil Print *'

documents.label: Proof required for an ex-army or imported vehicle
documents.sourceRef: Form 20 — '11. If ex-army or imported vehicle, enclose proof'; parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Original sales certificate from the concerned authorities in Form 21 in the case of ex-army vehicle'

documents.label: Customs clearance certificate, licence, and bond
documents.sourceRef: parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Custom's clearance certificate along with licence, and bond in case of imported vehicle'

documents.label: Temporary registration certificate, if any
documents.sourceRef: parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Temporary registration, if any'

documents.label: Copy of PAN card, or Form 60 and Form 61 (as applicable)
documents.sourceRef: parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Copy of PAN card or Form 60 and Form 61 (as applicable) *'

documents.label: Specimen signature or thumb impression of the registered owner
documents.statement: Signature or thumb impression of the registered owner. Specimen signature or thumb-impression of the person to be registered as Registered Owner: (1) (2)

documents.label: Vehicle registration fee
documents.sourceRef: Form 20 — '39. I have paid the prescribed fee of Rs. .......................'; parivahan.gov.in 'Permanent Registration' guidance — 'Pay appropriate fee as specified in Rule 81 ... depending on the choice of registration number and use of HSRP/smart card' and 'Pay Tax as per Central Motor Vehicle Rules 1989'. Amount not encoded as a fixed field value since fees and tax are set by rule, vary by vehicle class/registration-number choice/HSRP-or-smart-card use, and can change over time, consistent with this registry's other MoRTH fee entries.

steps.title: Registered owner identity and ownership type
